recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Loving Vincent
recommendations.overview: A young man arrives at the last hometown of painter Vincent van Gogh to deliver the troubled artist's final letter and ends up investigating his final days there.

recommendations.title: Deep in the Valley

recommendations.title: The Absent One
recommendations.overview: Denmark, 2014. A former police officer asks Carl Mørck, head of Department Q, to find out who brutally killed his young twins in 1994. Although a local inhabitant confessed and was convicted of murder, Carl and his partner Assad soon realize that the

recommendations.title: Carl's Date
recommendations.overview: Carl Fredricksen reluctantly agrees to go on a date with a lady friend—but admittedly has no idea how dating works these days. Ever the helpful friend, Dug steps in to calm Carl's pre-date jitters and offer some tried-and-true tips for making friends

recommendations.title: Saving Face
recommendations.overview: A Chinese-American lesbian and her traditionalist mother are reluctant to go public with secret loves that clash against cultural expectations.

recommendations.title: The Marco Effect
recommendations.overview: When a homeless Romani boy is arrested at the Danish border for possession of a missing public servant's passport, police inspector Carl Mørck and Department Q are tasked with finding the connection.

recommendations.title: Little Ashes
recommendations.overview: About the young life and loves of artist Salvador Dalí, filmmaker Luis Buñuel and writer Federico García Lorca.

recommendations.title: Prime
recommendations.overview: A career driven professional from Manhattan is wooed by a young painter, who also happens to be the son of her psychoanalyst.
